asciichat_thread_wrapper_t(3) Library Functions Manual asciichat_thread_wrapper_t(3)

NAME

asciichat_thread_wrapper_t - Internal thread wrapper for automatic cleanup.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/platform/thread.h>

Data Fields


void *(* user_func )(void *)
void * user_arg

Detailed Description

Internal thread wrapper for automatic cleanup.

This structure is used internally by asciichat_thread_create() to wrap user thread functions with automatic cleanup (mutex stack cleanup, etc). Users should not interact with this directly.

Definition at line 99 of file include/ascii-chat/platform/thread.h.

Field Documentation

void* asciichat_thread_wrapper_t::user_arg
